direct.label: Direct prompt submission
direct.description: These model shortcuts should submit prompt directly.

populates.label: Prompt populates, user submits
populates.description: These model shortcuts should load the prompt, and the user will need to submit it.

paste.label: No populated text, user pastes prompt
paste.description: These model shortcuts do not load the prompt, and the user will need to paste in the prompt text, which is automatically copied to their clipboard upon submitting here.
